quotes.text: The best time to start a business was yesterday. The second best time is now. The worst time is 'when the market is ready.'
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: You don't need permission to start. You don't need a co-founder to start. You don't need funding to start. You need to start.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start is now. Not when you're ready. You'll never be ready.
quotes.author: based
